text: It feels as though I am wandering through a quiet and deserted office or institutional building at night, the silence broken only by the hum of lights. The stark artificial illumination and shadows cast an eerie yet contemplative mood. I am reminded of liminality: this in-between space, neither entirely welcoming nor wholly forbidding, stirs a sense of curiosity in me mixed with a subtle unease. I find myself questioning the nature of emptiness and presence in such constructed environments.
